calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Arnold Evje, II. Esq. for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, present by Valerie Stratham, the property manager.
Defendant, Fetaimauso Segi present in pro per
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by Stipulation, for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of the action With Prejudice.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 970 Ellsworth Street, San Francisco. Stayed of execution as long as the Defendant pays the remaining back rent of $443.00 in monthly installment of $100.00 plus the monthly rental of $280.00 starting July 1, 2003. If Defendant complies with the terms, Plaintiff to dismissed with prejudice.
If the Defendant fails to comply with the terms, Plaintiff shall upon Ex Parte Application and declaration to the Court, with at 24 hours notice to the Defendant, obtain a Judgment for immediate restitution and possession of the premises. Judgment for all rents and per diem damages. Forfeiture of the rental agreement. Defendant warrants that no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession, waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture, any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
Each party waives claim against the other.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2003 Vacated
